$ ghost in your browser

A rogue ghost has hijacked your mouse. Use keyboard shortcuts to hunt it down.

Press Space to initialize

💡 Tested only in Chrome and macOS. For the best experience, play in Full Screen mode and disable View → Always Show Toolbar in Full Screen in Chrome.

SELECT OPERATION

Browser Basics

New tabs, reload, find, scroll

Press ⌘ + B

Tab Warfare

Navigate, jump, reopen tabs

Press ⌘ + E

Nav & Windows

History, windows, incognito

Press ⌘ + I

Page Mastery

Zoom, reload, bookmark, print

Press ⌘ + O
